user.title: GUI Recorder
user.description: Create the configuration entry to enable the GUI Recorder sidebar panel.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one GUI Recorder instance is allowed.
abort.unsupported_database: GUI Recorder currently only supports the SQLite recorder backend. Your Home Assistant recorder is configured to use a different database (MariaDB, MySQL or PostgreSQL), which is not supported by this integration.
abort.recorder_not_ready: The Home Assistant recorder is not ready yet. Please wait a moment and try again.
